issue_summary: fix: respect read limit in BoundedInputStream.available()
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Gets how many bytes remain to read.
     *
     * @return bytes how many bytes remain to read.
     * @since 2.16.0
     */
javadoc_after:
/** * Gets the number of bytes remaining to read before the maximum is reached. * *

* This method does not report the bytes available in the * underlying stream; it only reflects the remaining allowance imposed by this * {@code BoundedInputStream}. *

* * @return The number of bytes remaining to read before the maximum is reached, * or {@link Long#MAX_VALUE} if no bound is set. * @since 2.16.0 */
